en.extract:
The yellow-eyed starling (Aplonis mystacea) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in Indonesia and Papua New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''yellow-eyed starling''' ('''''Aplonis mystacea''''') is a species of [[starling]] in the family [[Sturnidae]]. It is found in [[Indonesia]] and [[Papua New Guinea]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
